label: Default Project Template
description: Default project template shipped with agent-workspace. Composes the standard agent role library (owner + lead + planner/worker/review/security/pm/integrator) and declares the default project variable schema. New AgentCraft projects use this template unless another is selected.

roles.description: Human project owner. Created from the user who creates the project.
Coordinates the project. Auto-provisioned on project creation.
Breaks goals into features and ready work items.
Executes assigned work and returns handoff evidence.
Audits implementation work for security risks.
Watches stalls, risks, load, and coordination health.
Connects accepted work to external systems (GitHub, CI, releases).
